lesson.title: Optical Pulse Counter (on hold)
lesson.description: Reserved. A true interrupt counter needs something that stores and increments a number on each beam break — not just a steady alarm (lessons 72–73) or a single edge flash (cap-coupled gate). This kit has no counter IC or display; plan to teach counting with the Arduino block (lessons 96+). Until then, use lesson 72 or 73 for optical on/off demos.
